description: Add unit tests for sanitize utility (shared-ui) and logger utility (common) based on code review feedback.
steps: Add vitest devDependency and test script to @quant/common package.json
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test to verify
acceptance_criteria: sanitize.test.ts tests all cases for sanitizeHtmlContent and sanitizeCodeHighlight
logger.test.ts tests environment gating and prefix behavior
pnpm test passes including new tests
